title: 2026 Half-Year Results
gist: This is a Glencore investor-relations scheduling notice, not a results release: it confirms the 2026 Half-Year Production Report drops 29 July 2026 and the full Half-Year Results on 5 August 2026, both at 7.00am UK via the LSE Regulatory News Service. No financial, production, pricing, or capital-allocation data is disclosed in the text.

insights.claim: Glencore plc will release its 2026 Half-Year Production Report on Wednesday, 29 July 2026 at 7.00am UK time via the London Stock Exchange Regulatory News Service.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: The 29 July production report is the first hard read on H1 2026 volumes; watch it ahead of the 5 August results for any production-driven earnings surprise.
insights.quote: Glencore plc will release its 2026 Half-Year Production Report on Wednesday, 29 July 2026.

insights.claim: Glencore's full 2026 Half-Year Results will be released on Wednesday, 5 August 2026 at 7.00am UK, with a live audio webcast at 8.00am UK and presentation slides downloadable from 7.00am the same day.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: 5 August is the key catalyst date for H1 earnings, dividend/buyback commentary and guidance; the 8.00am webcast is where management color emerges.
insights.quote: Our 2026 Half-Year Results will be released on Wednesday, 5 August 2026.
insights.locator: 2026 Half-Year Results Presentation on Wednesday, 5 August 2026
